requirement_topic.en: NRTL Electrical Safety Listing — UL 62368-1 / UL 60335
requirement_topic.zh: NRTL电气安全认证 — UL 62368-1 / UL 60335
requirement_topic.zht: NRTL電氣安全認證 — UL 62368-1 / UL 60335

summary.en: Data-center liquid-cooling equipment (cold plates, coolant distribution units / CDUs) sold for US workplace or permitted installations is typically expected by AHJs and customers to carry a listing mark from an OSHA-recognized Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL). ICT-facing electrical components of the CDU (controls, power supply, fans, pumps driven by low-voltage electronics) may be evaluated against UL 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements) as an NRTL evaluation route. UL/CSA 62368-1 3rd Edition remains the primary NRTL listing route for US market purposes; the 4th Edition was published July 2025 and NRTLs may begin accepting it for new listings — the transition is underway but no mandatory US cutover date has been set. CDU refrigerant sub-assemblies incorporating vapor-compression or heat-pump circuits are commonly evaluated under UL/CAN/IEC 60335-2-40 (Heat Pumps, Air-Conditioners and Dehumidifiers), not UL 60335-2-41. Non-refrigerant pump-only sub-assemblies may fall under UL 60335-2-41 (Pumps) but this is uncommon for CDU designs — confirm scope with the NRTL before testing. Hermetic motor-compressors are evaluated under UL 60335-2-34. OSHA recognises NRTLs under 29 CFR 1910.7; accepted NRTLs include UL, CSA, Intertek (ETL), and TUV SUD.
summary.zh: 面向美国工作场所或需许可安装场景销售的数据中心液冷设备（冷板、冷却液分配单元/CDU），通常会被AHJ和客户要求取得OSHA认可的全国认可测试实验室（NRTL）认证标志。CDU中面向ICT侧的电气部件（控制器、电源、风扇、由低压电子驱动的泵）可将UL 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备安全要求）作为NRTL评估路径之一。UL/CSA 62368-1第3版仍为美国市场主要NRTL认证路径；第4版已于2025年7月发布，各NRTL机构可能开始接受新认证申请——过渡期已启动，但美国尚未设定强制切换日期。包含蒸气压缩或热泵回路的CDU制冷子组件通常依据UL/CAN/IEC 60335-2-40（热泵、空调及除湿机）进行评估，而非UL 60335-2-41。纯泵子组件（无制冷剂回路）可能适用UL 60335-2-41（泵），但在CDU设计中并不常见——测试前请与NRTL确认适用范围。全封闭电动压缩机依据UL 60335-2-34进行评估。OSHA依据29 CFR 1910.7认可各NRTL机构，包括UL、CSA、Intertek（ETL）及TUV SUD。
summary.zht: 面向美國工作場所或需許可安裝場景銷售的資料中心液冷設備（冷板、冷卻液分配單元/CDU），通常會被AHJ和客戶要求取得OSHA認可的全國認可測試實驗室（NRTL）認證標誌。CDU中面向ICT側的電氣部件（控制器、電源、風扇、由低壓電子驅動的泵）可將UL 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通訊技術設備安全要求）作為NRTL評估路徑之一。UL/CSA 62368-1第3版仍為美國市場主要NRTL認證路徑；第4版已於2025年7月發布，各NRTL機構可能開始接受新認證申請——過渡期已啟動，但美國尚未設定強制切換日期。包含蒸氣壓縮或熱泵回路的CDU製冷子組件通常依據UL/CAN/IEC 60335-2-40（熱泵、空調及除濕機）進行評估，而非UL 60335-2-41。純泵子組件（無製冷劑回路）可能適用UL 60335-2-41（泵），但在CDU設計中並不常見——測試前請與NRTL確認適用範圍。全封閉電動壓縮機依據UL 60335-2-34進行評估。OSHA依據29 CFR 1910.7認可各NRTL機構，包括UL、CSA、Intertek（ETL）及TUV SUD。

standards_or_laws: UL 62368-1 Ed. 3 — Audio/Video, IT and Communication Technology Equipment Safety (current NRTL listing standard; Ed. 4 published July 2025, transition underway — no mandatory US cutover date set yet)
UL 60335-2-34 — Particular Requirements for Motor-Compressors (hermetic refrigerant pump sub-assemblies)
UL/CAN/IEC 60335-2-40 — Particular Requirements for Heat Pumps, Air-Conditioners and Dehumidifiers (CDU refrigerant/vapor-compression sub-assemblies)
UL 60335-2-41 — Particular Requirements for Pumps [non-refrigerant pump-only sub-assemblies; uncommon for CDU designs — confirm scope with NRTL]
29 CFR 1910.7 — OSHA NRTL Recognition Program
NEC Article 110.3(B) — Equipment listed by NRTL must be installed per listing and labeling instructions

summary.en: Chinese CDU and cold-plate manufacturers typically hold GB 4943.1 (Safety of IT Equipment, equivalent to IEC 60950-1) and/or GB/T 42315 (the Chinese adoption of IEC 62368-1) certifications issued by CCC-authorised labs (e.g. CCAI, CTI). Pump sub-assemblies may be assessed under GB 4706.70 (hermetic motor-compressors, aligned with IEC 60335-2-34). GB/T 51409-2021 (Technical Standard for Green Data Centers) and YD/T 2378 series address data-center cooling system performance but are not equipment-level safety standards. [UNVERIFIED: GB/T 42315 adoption status and whether CCC mark is mandatory for CDU exports — CCC is mandatory only for products in the CCC catalogue; CDUs may not be listed.]
summary.zh: 中国CDU与冷板制造商通常持有由CCC授权实验室（如CCAI、CTI）颁发的GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，等同IEC 60950-1）和/或GB/T 42315（IEC 62368-1中国版本）认证。泵子组件可依据GB 4706.70（全封闭电动压缩机，对应IEC 60335-2-34）进行评估。GB/T 51409-2021（绿色数据中心技术标准）及YD/T 2378系列涵盖数据中心冷却系统性能，但不属于设备级安全标准。[未经核实：GB/T 42315采用状态及CCC标志是否强制适用于CDU出口——CCC仅对列入目录的产品强制要求，CDU可能不在此列。]
summary.zht: 中國CDU與冷板製造商通常持有由CCC授權實驗室（如CCAI、CTI）頒發的GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，等同IEC 60950-1）和/或GB/T 42315（IEC 62368-1中國版本）認證。泵子組件可依據GB 4706.70（全封閉電動壓縮機，對應IEC 60335-2-34）進行評估。GB/T 51409-2021（綠色資料中心技術標準）及YD/T 2378系列涵蓋資料中心冷卻系統性能，但不屬於設備級安全標準。[未經核實：GB/T 42315採用狀態及CCC標誌是否強制適用於CDU出口——CCC僅對列入目錄的產品強制要求，CDU可能不在此列。]

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Safety of Information Technology Equipment (aligned with IEC 60950-1 / partial IEC 62368-1 transition)
GB/T 42315-2023 — Safety Requirements for Audio/Video, IT and Communication Equipment (IEC 62368-1 adoption) [UNVERIFIED mandatory status for CDUs]
GB 4706.70-2008 — Particular Requirements for Hermetic Motor-Compressors (aligned with IEC 60335-2-34)
GB/T 51409-2021 — Technical Standard for Green Data Center (performance, not equipment safety)
YD/T 2378.1-2013 — Data Center Liquid Cooling System Technical Requirements

gap.en: US AHJs and data-center operators commonly require an NRTL listing mark (UL, ETL, CSA, etc.) issued by an OSHA-recognized lab. Chinese GB certifications and CCC marks are not recognised by US AHJs and cannot substitute for an NRTL listing or field evaluation. A Chinese manufacturer should engage an NRTL directly to determine the applicable product category and evaluate the product to UL 62368-1 (and UL 60335 sub-parts where applicable) before shipment. Additionally, the transition from IEC 60950-1 (GB 4943.1) to IEC 62368-1 (UL 62368-1 / GB/T 42315) means products certified only to the older Chinese standard may fail the current US standard's hazard-based safety engineering (HBSE) framework.
gap.zh: 美国AHJ及数据中心运营商通常要求产品贴有OSHA认可实验室颁发的NRTL认证标志（UL、ETL、CSA等）。中国的GB认证及CCC标志不被美国AHJ认可，无法替代NRTL认证或现场评估。中国制造商应在发货前直接委托NRTL确定适用产品类别，并依据UL 62368-1（及适用的UL 60335子部分）对产品进行评估。此外，从IEC 60950-1（GB 4943.1）向IEC 62368-1（UL 62368-1/GB/T 42315）的过渡意味着仅持有旧版中国标准认证的产品可能无法满足美国现行标准基于危害的安全工程（HBSE）框架要求。
gap.zht: 美國AHJ及資料中心運營商通常要求產品貼有OSHA認可實驗室頒發的NRTL認證標誌（UL、ETL、CSA等）。中國的GB認證及CCC標誌不被美國AHJ認可，無法替代NRTL認證或現場評估。中國製造商應在發貨前直接委託NRTL確定適用產品類別，並依據UL 62368-1（及適用的UL 60335子部分）對產品進行評估。此外，從IEC 60950-1（GB 4943.1）向IEC 62368-1（UL 62368-1/GB/T 42315）的過渡意味著僅持有舊版中國標準認證的產品可能無法滿足美國現行標準基於危害的安全工程（HBSE）框架要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory obligation comes from OSHA workplace rules, adopted electrical/building codes, and AHJ permit/inspection approval. UL 62368-1 and UL 60335 sub-parts are voluntary consensus standards used by NRTLs to evaluate products; they become required only when selected by the NRTL, incorporated by code/AHJ, or imposed by contract.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-catalogue products (CCC mark); GB 4943.1 / GB/T 42315 apply to IT equipment sold in China — mandatory status for CDU export products requires confirmation [UNVERIFIED]

source.publisher: OSHA — Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL) Program

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. Chinese GB/CCC credentials are not accepted by US AHJs as substitutes for NRTL listing or AHJ field evaluation. Manufacturer should contract an OSHA-recognized NRTL to identify the applicable listing category and evaluate the CDU/cold-plate system, commonly to UL 62368-1 Ed. 3 (Ed. 4 published July 2025 — transition underway; confirm which edition the NRTL is accepting at time of engagement), and to UL/CAN/IEC 60335-2-40 for refrigerant sub-assemblies (not 60335-2-41). Final installability depends on the adopted code and AHJ approval. This is not legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。中国的GB/CCC认证不被美国AHJ接受为NRTL认证或AHJ现场评估的替代。制造商应委托OSHA认可的NRTL确定适用认证类别，并对CDU/冷板系统进行评估，通常依据UL 62368-1第3版（第4版已于2025年7月发布，过渡期已启动——接洽NRTL时请确认其接受的版本），制冷子组件通常依据UL/CAN/IEC 60335-2-40（而非60335-2-41）。最终能否安装取决于已采纳规范和AHJ批准。本内容不构成法律或法规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。中國的GB/CCC認證不被美國AHJ接受為NRTL認證或AHJ現場評估的替代。製造商應委託OSHA認可的NRTL確定適用認證類別，並對CDU/冷板系統進行評估，通常依據UL 62368-1第3版（第4版已於2025年7月發布，過渡期已啟動——接洽NRTL時請確認其接受的版本），製冷子組件通常依據UL/CAN/IEC 60335-2-40（而非60335-2-41）。最終能否安裝取決於已採納規範和AHJ批准。本內容不構成法律或法規建議。

requirement_topic.en: ASHRAE TC 9.9 Liquid-Cooling Guidelines, NEC Electrical Install & ASME Pressure Vessels
requirement_topic.zh: ASHRAE TC 9.9液冷指南、NEC电气安装及ASME压力容器
requirement_topic.zht: ASHRAE TC 9.9液冷指南、NEC電氣安裝及ASME壓力容器

summary.en: Three complementary US requirements govern liquid-cooling system installation in data centers beyond the equipment safety listing: (1) ASHRAE TC 9.9 Liquid Cooling Guidelines for Datacom Equipment — an industry best-practice document (not a law) widely adopted by hyperscale and co-location operators as a contractual or procurement requirement; it specifies coolant supply temperatures, pressure, flow rates, leak detection, and secondary-loop design for direct liquid cooling (DLC) and rear-door heat exchangers (RDHx). (2) NEC (NFPA 70) governs all electrical wiring and connections of the CDU to facility power where adopted by the jurisdiction; relevant articles include 110 (general requirements), 300 (wiring methods), and 645 (information technology equipment rooms). Installation must be performed or supervised by a licensed electrician and inspected by the AHJ. (3) State boiler and pressure-vessel laws or AHJ rules may require ASME BPVC Section VIII Division 1 stamping if the CDU contains qualifying pressure vessels (e.g., expansion tanks, high-pressure refrigerant receivers) above applicable pressure/dimensional thresholds. [UNVERIFIED: whether typical CDU operating pressures and vessel dimensions trigger state/AHJ stamping requirements — confirm with mechanical engineer and AHJ.]
summary.zh: 除设备安全认证外，还有三项互补的美国要求规范数据中心液冷系统的安装：(1) ASHRAE TC 9.9《数据通信设备液冷指南》——一份行业最佳实践文件（非法律法规），被超大规模及托管运营商广泛作为合同或采购要求采用；内容涵盖直接液冷（DLC）和后门热交换器（RDHx）的冷却液供应温度、压力、流量、泄漏检测及二次回路设计。(2) NEC（NFPA 70）在被辖区采纳时规范CDU与设施电源之间的所有电气接线和连接；相关条款包括第110条（通用要求）、第300条（布线方法）及第645条（信息技术设备机房）；安装须由持证电工执行或监督，并经AHJ检查。(3) 若CDU含有超过适用压力/尺寸阈值的压力容器（如膨胀箱、高压制冷剂储液器），州锅炉和压力容器法律或AHJ规则可能要求按ASME BPVC第VIII卷第1分册取得印记。[未经核实：典型CDU工作压力和容器尺寸是否触发强制ASME印记要求——请与机械工程师及AHJ确认。]
summary.zht: 除設備安全認證外，還有三項互補的美國要求規範資料中心液冷系統的安裝：(1) ASHRAE TC 9.9《資料通訊設備液冷指南》——一份行業最佳實踐文件（非法律法規），被超大規模及託管運營商廣泛作為合同或採購要求採用；內容涵蓋直接液冷（DLC）和後門熱交換器（RDHx）的冷卻液供應溫度、壓力、流量、洩漏檢測及二次回路設計。(2) NEC（NFPA 70）在被轄區採納時規範CDU與設施電源之間的所有電氣接線和連接；相關條款包括第110條（通用要求）、第300條（佈線方法）及第645條（資訊技術設備機房）；安裝須由持證電工執行或監督，並經AHJ檢查。(3) 若CDU含有超過適用壓力／尺寸閾值的壓力容器（如膨脹箱、高壓製冷劑儲液器），州鍋爐和壓力容器法律或AHJ規則可能要求按ASME BPVC第VIII卷第1分冊取得印記。[未經核實：典型CDU工作壓力和容器尺寸是否觸發強制ASME印記要求——請與機械工程師及AHJ確認。]

standards_or_laws: ASHRAE TC 9.9 — Liquid Cooling Guidelines for Datacom Equipment Centers (industry best practice, not law)
NFPA 70 / NEC 2023 Article 110 — General Requirements for Electrical Installations
NFPA 70 / NEC 2023 Article 300 — Wiring Methods and Materials
NFPA 70 / NEC 2023 Article 645 — Information Technology Equipment
ASME BPVC Section VIII Division 1 — Rules for Construction of Pressure Vessels (used where state law or AHJ rules require ASME-stamped qualifying vessels)

summary.en: Chinese data-center liquid cooling practice is governed by GB/T 51409-2021 (Technical Standard for Green Data Centers), which includes liquid-cooling system design requirements for CDUs, cold plates, and coolant loops. YD/T 2378.1-2013 (Data Center Liquid Cooling System Technical Requirements) provides telecom-sector specific guidance. Electrical installation in Chinese data centers follows GB 50174-2017 (Code for Design of Electronic Information System Room) and GB 50054-2011 (Code for Design of Low-Voltage Electrical Installations). Pressure vessels in China are regulated under TSG 21-2016 (Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Stationary Pressure Vessels), administered by the State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR); vessels above specified thresholds require SAMR registration and periodic inspection. [UNVERIFIED: TSG 21 pressure threshold that triggers mandatory registration for CDU-scale vessels.]
summary.zh: 中国数据中心液冷实践由GB/T 51409-2021（绿色数据中心技术标准）规范，包括CDU、冷板及冷却液回路的液冷系统设计要求。YD/T 2378.1-2013（数据中心液冷系统技术要求）提供电信行业专项指导。中国数据中心电气安装遵循GB 50174-2017（电子信息系统机房设计规范）及GB 50054-2011（低压配电设计规范）。中国压力容器受TSG 21-2016（固定式压力容器安全技术监察规程）监管，由国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）负责执行；超过规定阈值的容器须向SAMR登记并接受定期检验。[未经核实：触发CDU级容器强制登记要求的TSG 21压力阈值。]
summary.zht: 中國資料中心液冷實踐由GB/T 51409-2021（綠色資料中心技術標準）規範，包括CDU、冷板及冷卻液回路的液冷系統設計要求。YD/T 2378.1-2013（資料中心液冷系統技術要求）提供電信行業專項指導。中國資料中心電氣安裝遵循GB 50174-2017（電子資訊系統機房設計規範）及GB 50054-2011（低壓配電設計規範）。中國壓力容器受TSG 21-2016（固定式壓力容器安全技術監察規程）監管，由國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）負責執行；超過規定閾值的容器須向SAMR登記並接受定期檢驗。[未經核實：觸發CDU級容器強制登記要求的TSG 21壓力閾值。]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 51409-2021 — Technical Standard for Green Data Center (includes liquid cooling system design)
YD/T 2378.1-2013 — Data Center Liquid Cooling System Technical Requirements
GB 50174-2017 — Code for Design of Electronic Information System Room
GB 50054-2011 — Code for Design of Low-Voltage Electrical Installations
TSG 21-2016 — Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Stationary Pressure Vessels (SAMR)

gap.en: ASHRAE TC 9.9 is not law, but major data-center operators and co-location providers may incorporate it into contractual specifications; Chinese GB/T 51409 and YD/T standards are not recognised as substitutes by US operators. NEC electrical installation requirements must be met at the site level by US-licensed contractors where the NEC is adopted by the jurisdiction; Chinese GB 50174 / GB 50054 are irrelevant to US AHJ inspections. ASME BPVC stamping may be required by state boiler and pressure-vessel laws for vessels meeting US dimensional/pressure thresholds; Chinese TSG 21 registration does not satisfy US AHJ requirements. No mutual recognition agreement (MRA) exists between ASME and SAMR for pressure vessel certification.
gap.zh: ASHRAE TC 9.9并非法律，但主要数据中心运营商及托管服务商可能将其纳入合同规范；中国的GB/T 51409和YD/T标准不被美国运营商认可为替代路径。NEC被相关辖区采纳时，电气安装要求须在工地层面由美国持证承包商满足；中国的GB 50174/GB 50054与美国AHJ检查无关。符合美国尺寸/压力阈值的压力容器，可能因州锅炉和压力容器法律而需要ASME BPVC认证印记；中国TSG 21登记不满足美国AHJ要求。ASME与SAMR之间不存在压力容器认证的相互认可协议（MRA）。
gap.zht: ASHRAE TC 9.9並非法律，但主要資料中心運營商及託管服務商可能將其納入合同規範；中國的GB/T 51409和YD/T標準不被美國運營商認可為替代路徑。NEC被相關轄區採納時，電氣安裝要求須在工地層面由美國持證承包商滿足；中國的GB 50174/GB 50054與美國AHJ檢查無關。符合美國尺寸/壓力閾值的壓力容器，可能因州鍋爐和壓力容器法律而需要ASME BPVC認證印記；中國TSG 21登記不滿足美國AHJ要求。ASME與SAMR之間不存在壓力容器認證的相互認可協議（MRA）。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed — adopted electrical/building codes and state boiler/pressure-vessel laws create the mandatory obligations. ASHRAE TC 9.9 is voluntary unless incorporated by contract, operator specification, permit condition, or AHJ requirement; ASME BPVC is a consensus code used to show compliance where state law or AHJ rules require ASME-stamped qualifying vessels.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 51409-2021 is a national standard (recommended, not compulsory on its own, but referenced by mandatory regulations); TSG 21 pressure vessel registration is mandatory above specified thresholds under SAMR

source.publisher: ASHRAE — Technical Committee 9.9, Mission Critical Facilities, Data Centers, Technology Spaces and Electronic Equipment

compliance_verdict.en: Significant gaps exist across all three areas. Chinese exporters should: (1) verify whether target customers contractually require ASHRAE TC 9.9 coolant specifications; (2) ensure electrical connections comply with the NEC as adopted locally and are handled by a licensed US contractor at the installation site; (3) assess whether any CDU pressure vessel components require ASME BPVC Section VIII stamping under state law or AHJ rules. Chinese equivalent certifications (GB/T 51409, TSG 21, GB 50174) are not substitutes for US AHJ review or operator specifications. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 三个领域均存在显著差距。中国出口商应：(1) 核实目标客户是否在合同中要求符合ASHRAE TC 9.9冷却液规范；(2) 确保电气连接符合当地采纳的NEC要求，并由持证美国承包商在安装现场处理；(3) 评估CDU压力容器部件是否因州法律或AHJ规则需要ASME BPVC第VIII卷认证印记。中国的等效认证（GB/T 51409、TSG 21、GB 50174）不能替代美国AHJ审查或运营商规范。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或法规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 三個領域均存在顯著差距。中國出口商應：(1) 核實目標客戶是否在合同中要求符合ASHRAE TC 9.9冷卻液規範；(2) 確保電氣連接符合當地採納的NEC要求，並由持證美國承包商在安裝現場處理；(3) 評估CDU壓力容器部件是否因州法律或AHJ規則需要ASME BPVC第VIII卷認證印記。中國的等效認證（GB/T 51409、TSG 21、GB 50174）不能替代美國AHJ審查或運營商規範。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或法規建議。
